title: Cobblemon Cold Sweat Compatibility
description: A compatibility pack for Cobblemon and Cold Sweat temperature system.
body:
This datapack adds compatibility between Cobblemon and Cold Sweat. While out of their Pokéballs, warm Cobblemons will emit heat and warm you and while cold Cobblemons will cool you. Please note that this pack is quite opinionated. Not all Cobblemons of the "fire" or "ice" type will warm/cool you. Only the Cobblemons that have a logical and/or lore reason to heat or cool the air around them will do so. Temperature values have been chosen for gameplay reasons, not to be lore accurate. Obviously, a Charizard's flame might be hotter than 45, but it won't be fun ingame to burn everytime your within 10 meters of your Charizard. _Warm emitting Cobblemons_ do so at a range of 10 for between 25°C to 35°C (77°F to 95°F) within a range of 10 blocks. _Cold emitting Cobblemons_ do so at a range of 10 for between -10°C and -20°C degrees (14°F to -4°F) **Installation**: I suggest using of these Datapack loader. [Open loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader) by DarkhaxDev
[Global Data Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/datapacks) by Declipsonator
[Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) by JTK222
[Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) by YUNGNICKYOUNG
